titleStmt.title: SII 24.138: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 138. (A.R. No. 119 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by a resident of Malaināḍu (name lost) for rearing a flower-garden called Śūḍikkoḍuttāḷ for the god, when Veṅgūr Śrīrāmabhaṭṭa-Vājapēya[yā]jiyār was the Śrīkāryam of the temple. (Vide No. 134 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . periyakoyil śrī kāriyam veṅkūr cirāmapaṭṭar vājapeyayājiyār Evalpaṭi . tiruppatiyil civayiṣṇavaril vaṅkippuṟattu viṟṟirun=ta kkāviṭṭu talaivan pāṭa kuṭutta samman=tapattirappaṭi . tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu meṣa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa
ttu pañcamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūrāṭatti nāḷ periyakoyilil ppuṟattu viṟṟirun=tā nampiyen malaināṭṭukka ṭṭutu vāna pāccaṟukkāka nān ceyyakkaṭa vaṉattukku Ellaiyāvatu ten Oḻukil tiru nantavanattukku Icain=ta kiḻpāṟkellai toṭṭattāṇṭi tirunan=tavanattukku meṟkum tenpāṟke
llai tennāṟṟukku vaṭakku mipāṟkellai tiruvaraṅkatāsantirunantavaṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai meṟku nokkippona peruvaḻikku vicain=ta perunānkellai Uḷḷakappaṭṭa ttil van kuḷa mukkil kotai kaṇiceṭṭi ceyvikkiṟa tirunan=tavanam teṟku periya tirukkopurak k kolāl kuḻi [10]m nikki Ivanukku
Itin teṟkiṟ kuḻi 2 10 Ikkuḻi Irupatum Ivvāṇṭu mutal cūṭikkuṭuttā ḷennum tirunāmattāle Ivviṟṟirun=tānampiyum Ivan vaṅkcattārume cantirātittaval ceytu ppala tirupaḷḷittā vaittu māḷ ppaṭṭaruḷu nāḷkkaḷilum Iraṇṭu tirunāḷka ceytaruḷun tirukkāṭci
yum cāttiyaruḷivarun tiruppaḷḷittāmamum Eṭuttu viṇṇappañ ceyyakkaṭavanāka kuṭutta pon 4 Ippon nāluṅkoṇṭu Ittalai cūṭikkuṭuttaā ḷennu ntirunāmattāl cantirātittava kuṭutten viṟṟiruntānampiyen Ippaṭikku koyil
kaṇakku karuṇākarappiriyaneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
